h1: LG 21kg Washer + 12kg Dryer Combo (Front Load) — AI Inverter Direct Drive™, TurboWash3D™, Steam, 6 Motion DD, LG ThinQ® Wi-Fi — Stone Silver (WS2112BST)

gallery.a: Front view of LG WS2112BST 21kg washer + 12kg dryer combo in Stone Silver
45 degree angled view of the washer-dryer combo
Door open revealing the XL 21 kg stainless-steel drum
Back view showing water and power connections

modules.head: 14.5% more fabric protection, every load
modules.body: AI Inverter Direct Drive™ senses load weight and fabric softness, then auto-selects the optimal wash motion from LG's 6 Motion DD patterns. Result: maximum cleansing performance while extending the life of your clothes.
modules.disc: *14.5% vs. LG Normal cycle. Based on LG internal testing.

modules.head: One machine, two complete cycles
modules.body: A full-size 21 kg front-load washer and a built-in 12 kg dryer in a single 700 × 990 × 770 mm cabinet — wash, dry and fold in one place, no transfer, no second appliance to buy or service.

modules.eye: Get It All Done in Less Time
modules.head: Big family loads, smaller laundry day
modules.body: The XL 21 kg wash drum swallows a king-size duvet, curtains, or a full week of family laundry in one go — then the 12 kg dryer finishes them without you ever moving a thing.

imgs.a: Large loads handled in fewer cycles

modules.head: Laundry at the speed of life
modules.body: TurboWash3D™ combines multi-directional spray with LG's proven Direct Drive motion to rinse a full load in record time — so you spend less time doing laundry and more time living.

modules.head: Reduce allergens and bacteria, gently
modules.body: True Steam penetrates deep into fabrics to help reduce common household allergens and bacteria and relax wrinkles — ideal for bedding, towels, baby clothes and sensitive skin.

imgs.a: Steam cycle for hygienic, allergen-reduced laundry

modules.head: Forgot a sock? Just add it.
modules.body: The Add Item function safely pauses the cycle so you can toss in that missed shirt or sock without starting over — a small feature that saves a lot of frustration.

modules.head: Quieter operation, day or night
modules.body: LG's Inverter Direct Drive motor with vibration sensor keeps the washer/dryer whisper-quiet even on high-speed spin — perfect for open-plan living and late-night loads. Backed by a 10-year motor warranty.
modules.disc: *10-year Inverter Direct Drive motor warranty. Terms apply.

modules.head: Troubleshoot in seconds
modules.body: Smart Diagnosis™ quickly identifies most minor issues through the LG ThinQ® app before they become bigger problems — hold your phone to the washer, the app tells you what's happening, right away.

imgs.a: Smart Diagnosis on LG ThinQ app

modules.head: Start, monitor and control — from anywhere
modules.body: Launch cycles remotely, download new wash programs, monitor energy use and run Smart Diagnosis™ via the LG ThinQ® app. Hands-free voice control works with Amazon Alexa and Google Assistant.
